description.value: Top-level router element. Owns the URL signal, intercepts in-app anchor clicks, and exposes `navigate` / `replace` / `setSearchParam` programmatic APIs.

URL prefix the app is served under (e.g. `/meowter/` for GitHub Pages). Stripped before route matching, prepended when writing the URL bar. Defaults to `/`. Usually wired at runtime via `router.basepath = import.meta.env.BASE_URL`.
Declares a route pattern. Matched against the router's pathname (basepath-stripped). Empty `path` is the index route; `*` is the catch-all. `:param` segments are exposed via `route.params`.
Route pattern. Examples: `/`, `/cats`, `/cats/:id`, `` (index inside a parent), `*` (catch-all).
Renders the matching `<meow-route>` from its direct children, hiding the rest. Nest outlets inside routes for multi-level matching; inner outlets receive the parent's path remainder.
